name: CorporateBS_generate_phrase
description: Generate a random corporate buzzword phrase using the Corporate BS Generator API. Returns a single randomly generated corporate jargon phrase like 'Proactively leverage bleeding-edge paradigms' or 'Synergistically mesh robust platforms'. Useful for humor, placeholder text generation, testing text processing, satirical content creation, or demonstrating NLP on formulaic text patterns.

phrase.description: A randomly generated corporate buzzword phrase (e.g., 'Authoritatively Deliver Emerging Process Improvements')
